narrative.headline: Electrical, engine, and drivetrain issues lead 2022 Malibu owner complaints
narrative.summary: From 81 owner reports to NHTSA, the electrical system is the most common complaint at 35%, followed closely by the engine (27%) and the power train (27%). Engine and engine cooling (9%) and the fuel/propulsion system (6%) round out the list. Most reports are about reliability rather than safety: no fires or injuries were reported, and only 3 reports involved a crash (1 electrical, 2 power train). The details below are worth a read.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: The most reported area: 28 reports (35% of all complaints). Includes 1 crash; no fires or injuries reported.
